recent_incidents.title: payment checkout failures for 47 minutes
recent_incidents.notes: on-call followed payment-outage runbook; step 'scale deployment/payments-v1' failed with NotFound. Lost ~20 minutes identifying the actual deployment name. Mitigated by manual restart.

recent_incidents.title: api p99 latency degradation, self-recovered
